channel.title: World Bank Group Job Vacancies
channel.description: List of vacancies at the World Bank Group

item.title: Senior Investment Officer - Manufacturing, Agribusiness & Services (MAS) Europe, Upstream & Advisory
item.description: World Bank Group has a vacancy for the position of Senior Investment Officer - Manufacturing, Agribusiness & Services (MAS) Europe, Upstream & Advisory Location: Washington, DC.
